title: DataFile
description: DataFile schema from Apache Iceberg REST Catalog API

first-row-id.description: The first row ID assigned to the first row in the data file

column-sizes.description: Map of column id to total count, including null and NaN

value-counts.description: Map of column id to null value count

null-value-counts.description: Map of column id to null value count

nan-value-counts.description: Map of column id to number of NaN values in the column

lower-bounds.description: Map of column id to lower bound primitive type values

upper-bounds.description: Map of column id to upper bound primitive type values
